Michael Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and safety-conscious Forklift Operator with over 5 years of experience in warehouse environments. Proficient in operating various types of forklifts including reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts. Committed to maintaining OSHA compliance and ensuring efficient material handling. Experienced with Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) to optimize inventory control and logistics operations.

Experience
Forklift Operator  
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA  
January 2020 - Present  
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to move pallets and materials throughout the warehouse.  
- Ensure compliance with OSHA standards and company safety policies, resulting in zero accidents over the past year.  
- Utilize WMS for inventory tracking and management, improving order accuracy by 15%.  
- Assist in training new staff on proper forklift operations and safety protocols.

Warehouse Associate  
XYZ Distribution, Atlanta, GA  
March 2017 - December 2019  
- Responsible for loading and unloading trucks using forklifts, maintaining a high level of efficiency and accuracy.  
- Conducted regular equipment inspections and maintained records to adhere to safety regulations.  
- Collaborated with team members to streamline warehouse processes, reducing order processing time by 20%.

Certifications
- OSHA Class I/IV/V Forklift Certification  
- Forklift Safety Training Certification

Skills
- Forklift Operation (Reach Truck, Counterbalance)
